mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_chat_message(room_id, user_id, message_type, content, status, created_at) VALUES(#{roomId}, #{userId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, 1, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, r.room_code, u.nickname, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as avatar FROM forum_chat_message m JOIN forum_chat_room r ON m.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON m.user_id = u.user_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.*, r.room_code, u.nickname, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.`avatar` as avatar FROM forum_chat_message m JOIN forum_chat_room r ON m.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON m.user_id = u.user_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
